name: Favored Enemy
scalingSummary: 1 enemy type at L1, 1 more at L6, 1 more at L14
mechanicalSummary: Choose a type of favored enemy. Advantage on Survival checks to track them and Intelligence checks to recall information about them. Learn one language spoken by them.

evidence.pointer: Ranger L1: Favored Enemy; L6/L14: improvement; featureDescriptions

name: Natural Explorer
scalingSummary: 1 terrain at L1, 1 more at L6, 1 more at L10
mechanicalSummary: When in favored terrain: difficult terrain doesn't slow group travel, can't become lost, remain alert to danger while foraging/tracking/navigating, can move stealthily at normal pace alone, find twice the food while foraging, double proficiency on Int/Wis checks about terrain.

evidence.pointer: Ranger L1: Natural Explorer; improvements; featureDescriptions

name: Fighting Style
mechanicalSummary: Choose one Fighting Style: Archery (+2 ranged attacks), Defense (+1 AC), Dueling (+2 damage), or Two-Weapon Fighting (add ability mod to off-hand damage).

name: Spellcasting (Ranger)
scalingSummary: Half caster (known spells); Wisdom-based; slots start at L2
mechanicalSummary: Known caster: learn spells from the ranger list. Half-caster slot progression starting at L2. 2 spells known at L2, scaling to 11.

name: Primeval Awareness
rechargeSummary: Spell slots recharge on long rest
mechanicalSummary: Expend a spell slot to sense whether specific creature types (aberrations, celestials, dragons, elementals, fey, fiends, undead) are present within 1 mile (6 miles in favored terrain) for 1 minute per slot level.

name: Extra Attack
mechanicalSummary: Attack twice when taking the Attack action.

name: Land's Stride
mechanicalSummary: Nonmagical difficult terrain costs no extra movement. Pass through nonmagical plants without being slowed or damaged. Advantage on saves against magically created plant hazards.

name: Hide in Plain Sight
mechanicalSummary: Spend 1 minute creating camouflage. +10 to Dexterity (Stealth) while stationary against that background. Must prepare new camouflage to change locations.

evidence.pointer: Ranger L10: Hide in Plain Sight; featureDescriptions

name: Vanish
mechanicalSummary: Can take the Hide action as a bonus action. Also can't be tracked by nonmagical means unless you choose to leave a trail.
notes: Hide as bonus action — rogue-like capability.

name: Feral Senses
mechanicalSummary: No disadvantage on attacks against invisible creatures you can't see. Aware of invisible creatures within 30 ft (not hidden from you unless they successfully Hide).

name: Foe Slayer
trigger: Once per turn, when hitting a favored enemy with a weapon attack
mechanicalSummary: Add Wisdom modifier to one attack roll or damage roll against a favored enemy per turn. Can apply after seeing the roll but before the result.

name: Colossus Slayer (Hunter)
trigger: Once per turn, when hitting a creature below its HP maximum with a weapon attack
mechanicalSummary: Deal an extra 1d8 damage to a wounded creature.

name: Giant Killer (Hunter)
trigger: When a Large or larger creature within 5 ft hits or misses you with an attack
mechanicalSummary: Use reaction to make one weapon attack against the triggering creature.

name: Horde Breaker (Hunter)
trigger: Once per turn, when making a weapon attack
mechanicalSummary: Make an additional attack against a different creature within 5 ft of the original target and within weapon range.

name: Volley (Hunter)
mechanicalSummary: Use an action to make a ranged attack against every creature in a 10-ft-radius area within weapon range. Each target requires a separate attack roll.
notes: Choice between Volley (ranged AoE) and Whirlwind Attack (melee).

name: Whirlwind Attack (Hunter)
mechanicalSummary: Use an action to make a melee attack against every creature within 5 ft of you. Each target requires a separate attack roll.

name: Ranger's Companion (Beast Master - 2014)
scalingSummary: Companion stats scale with ranger level
mechanicalSummary: Gain a beast companion (CR 1/4 or lower). Companion acts on your initiative. You can command it verbally at no action cost on your turn to move, or use your action to command it to Attack, Dash, Disengage, Dodge, or Help.

evidence.pointer: beast-master L3: Ranger's Companion (also has Primal Companion as duplicate)

notes: BUG-6: Both 2014 Ranger's Companion and Tasha's Primal Companion are listed at L3 as mutually-exclusive variants. The app lists both.

name: Dread Ambusher (Gloom Stalker)
mechanicalSummary: At the start of first turn of each combat, gain +10 ft walking speed. If taking the Attack action on that turn, make one additional weapon attack that deals an extra 1d8 damage on hit.
notes: First-round nova feature — bonus attack and extra damage.

name: Umbral Sight (Gloom Stalker)
mechanicalSummary: Gain darkvision 60 ft (or +30 ft if already have darkvision). While in darkness, invisible to creatures relying on darkvision to see you.

name: Stalker's Flurry (Gloom Stalker)
trigger: When you miss with a weapon attack during the Attack action
mechanicalSummary: Make one additional weapon attack against the same target once per turn when you miss.

name: Shadowy Dodge (Gloom Stalker)
trigger: When attacked by a creature you can see
mechanicalSummary: Use reaction to impose disadvantage on the attack roll.

name: Planar Warrior (Horizon Walker)
scalingSummary: Damage: 1d8 force at L3, 2d8 at L11
mechanicalSummary: As a bonus action, choose a creature within 30 ft. Next time you hit it this turn with a weapon attack, all damage becomes force and deal extra 1d8 force.

name: Distant Strike (Horizon Walker)
mechanicalSummary: When taking the Attack action, can teleport up to 10 ft before each attack. If attacking at least two different creatures, make one additional attack against a third creature.

name: Slayer's Prey (Monster Slayer)
mechanicalSummary: As a bonus action, designate a creature within 60 ft. First weapon attack hitting it each turn deals an extra 1d6 damage. Lasts until target dies, you rest, or you designate a new target.

name: Slayer's Counter (Monster Slayer)
trigger: When your Slayer's Prey target forces you to make a saving throw
mechanicalSummary: Use reaction to make one weapon attack against the creature. If the attack hits, your save automatically succeeds in addition to damage.

name: Dreadful Strikes (Fey Wanderer)
trigger: Once per turn, when hitting with a weapon attack
mechanicalSummary: Deal extra 1d4 psychic damage once per turn on a weapon hit. Increases at L11.

name: Beguiling Twist (Fey Wanderer)
trigger: When you or a creature within 120 ft succeeds on a save against being charmed or frightened
mechanicalSummary: Use reaction to force a different creature within 120 ft to make a Wisdom save or be charmed or frightened (your choice) for 1 minute.

name: Gathered Swarm (Swarmkeeper)
trigger: Once per turn, when hitting with an attack
scalingSummary: Damage: 1d6 piercing at L3, extra at L11
mechanicalSummary: After hitting a creature, the swarm can: deal 1d6 piercing damage, force Str save or move target 15 ft horizontally, or move yourself 5 ft horizontally.
